title: Ticket 03 - Baseline protection & standards
description: Dummy data for ticket 03 - baseline protection & standards (V01) in the DoomScrollQuiz.

questions.prompt: In ticket 03 the key statement appears: "Classify and apply training-company baseline protection standards safely in daily work." What did he say?

options.text: We should clearly understand training-company baseline protection standards in daily work and implement them cleanly.
options.explanation: This summarizes the core idea of training-company baseline protection standards in a direct, practical way.

options.text: We can ignore training-company baseline protection standards as long as there is no time pressure.
options.explanation: Training-company baseline protection standards should not be postponed or ignored.

options.text: Only the team lead is allowed to deal with training-company baseline protection standards.
options.explanation: This makes the topic unnecessarily exclusive and misses the learning idea.

options.text: Training-company baseline protection standards only become relevant after the project ends.
options.explanation: The learning idea should be applied during ongoing daily work.

questions.prompt: Which reaction best fits ticket 03 regarding training-company baseline protection standards?

options.text: Align briefly, document cleanly, and make the next step clear.
options.explanation: This combines clarification, transparency, and actionable implementation.

options.text: Write nothing down at first and decide later by feel.
options.explanation: For training-company baseline protection standards this would be imprecise and risky.

options.text: Only raise problems once they are fully escalated.
options.explanation: The right direction is to clarify early instead of escalating late.

options.text: Avoid questions even if the goal is still unclear.
options.explanation: The learning idea requires clarity, not silent guessing.
